basic_details.job_title: BOB Assistant Vice President Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bank of Baroda (BOB) Assistant Vice President Notification 2026 has been released on 11 July 2026 on the official website bankofbaroda.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the BOB Assistant Vice President Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.general_fee: Rs.850/- (Inclusive of GST) + Payment Gateway Charges
application_fee.sc_fee: Rs.175/- (Inclusive of GST) + Payment Gateway Charges
application_fee.female_fee: Rs.175/- (Inclusive of GST) + Payment Gateway Charges

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 27 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for any applicable relaxations.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline, B.E/B.Tech/BCA/MCA/M.E/M.Tech (Computer Science/IT/Data Science), Bachelor's/Master's in Statistics/Maths/Economics/Quantitative Field, MCA/MBA/PGDM, Professional Certifications: SAFe Program Consultant (SPC), Certified Agile Coach (ICP-ACC), PMI-ACP, Salesforce Architect (CRM), Bachelor's/Master's in Finance/Economics/Accounting/Business Administration/Mathematics/Financial Engineering, CFA/CA/CPA/CMA/CAIA/ACCA/FRM/CIMA
qualification.details: Assistant Vice President II- Data Analyst/ Data Scientist: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline. Preferred: B.E/B.Tech/BCA/MCA/M.E/M.Tech (in Computer Science/IT/Data Science) or Bachelor's/ Master's (in Statistics/ Maths / Economics / any relative Quantitative Field). Strong Python/R/SQL/BI/ML skills with relevant certifications. Assistant Vice President II- Project Management Specialist: Bachelor's degree in any discipline. Preferred: B.E./B.Tech (in any discipline)/MCA/MBA/PGDM. Degree/Diploma in Relevant field and/or Professional Certification: SAFe Program Consultant (SPC), Certified Agile Coach (ICP-ACC), PMI-ACP, Salesforce Architect (CRM). Assistant Vice President I- Agile Transformation Expert: Bachelor's degree in any discipline. Preferred: BE/B.Tech/ME/M.Tech/BCA/MCA or Any Bachelor's/Master's degree in Computer applications/ computer science/ relevant field. Certification: SAFe Program Consultant (SPC), Certified Agile Coach (ICP-ACC), PMI-ACP, Salesforce Architect (CRM). Assistant Vice President I- Business Finance Analyst with BFSI Exposure: Bachelor's degree in any discipline. Preferred: Bachelors / Master's degree in Finance/ Economics/ Accounting/ Business Administration/ Mathematics/ Financial Engineering. CFA/ CA/ CPA/ CMA/ CAIA/ ACCA/ FRM/ CIMA/ relevant tertiary qualification.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BOB Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BOB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BOB Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BOB Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BOB Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BOB Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Application Scrutiny Online Test Psychometric Test Group Discussion Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BOB Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BOB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BOB Assistant Vice President posts?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application and payment of fees is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Vice President post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Assistant Vice President posts in Bank of Baroda. These vacancies are distributed across different specializations as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Assistant Vice President posts is 27 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Specific age relaxation details, if any, should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the BOB Assistant Vice President recruitment?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications are diverse, including Bachelor's Degree in any discipline, specialized degrees in Computer Science, IT, Data Science, Statistics, Maths, Economics, Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, and professional certifications like CFA, CA, CPA, etc.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 850/- (Inclusive of GST) plus applicable payment gateway charges. This fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST and Women candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 175/- (Inclusive of GST) plus applicable payment gateway charges.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Vice President posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves Application Scrutiny, followed by an Online Test, Psychometric Test, Group Discussion, and a final Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these Assistant Vice President positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Assistant Vice President positions is contractual. Candidates should carefully review the terms and conditions related to the contract period.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for BOB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the BOB Assistant Vice President posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of Bank of Baroda or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section, on or before the last date of application.
